activation_mode.mechanism: mode_partitioned_activation: rule files in mode-specific directories (.roo/rules-<mode-slug>/) activate only when that mode is active; files in .roo/rules/ activate for all modes

auto_memory.mechanism: No auto-append or persistent memory command documented for rule content

cross_provider_recognition.mechanism: legacy_clinerules_fallback: Roo Code reads .clinerules/ as a backward-compatibility fallback when native .roo/rules/ is absent

file_imports.mechanism: No import directive syntax documented — rule files are loaded as plain markdown bodies

hierarchical_loading.mechanism: mode_scoped_loading: files under .roo/rules/ load universally; files under .roo/rules-<mode>/ load conditionally based on the active mode

providerExtensions.name: Mode-partitioned rule directories
providerExtensions.summary: Per-mode directories (.roo/rules-code/, .roo/rules-architect/, .roo/rules-ask/, .roo/rules-debug/, .roo/rules-orchestrator/, and one per custom mode slug) scope rule files to a specific mode so only active-mode rules enter context.

providerExtensions.name: Universal .roo/rules/ directory
providerExtensions.summary: Files under .roo/rules/ apply to every mode and are concatenated into system context regardless of the currently active mode.

providerExtensions.name: Legacy .roorules single-file rules
providerExtensions.summary: Single-file .roorules at the project root is honored for backward compatibility with pre-directory rule conventions.

providerExtensions.name: .clinerules/ backward compatibility
providerExtensions.summary: Roo Code reads .clinerules/ directories from its Cline ancestry when no .roo/rules/ directory is present so existing Cline rule sets continue to work.
